_notes: Edit this file to add/update shows. status options: upcoming, attending, completed, cancelled. tableSize options: single, double, corner, half-room. dateEnd is optional (for multi-day events).

shows.name: Chicagoland Card Collector Expo
shows.address: 18451 Convention Center Dr, Tinley Park, IL 60477
shows.description: One of the largest card shows in the Chicagoland area. Bud will be running a double table with a full spread of Pokémon, Magic, sports cards, and sealed product.

shows.name: Bolingbrook Trading Card Show
shows.description: Local monthly show. Great community event — come say hi and bring your collections for trade!

shows.name: Midwest Sports & TCG Card Show
shows.description: Premier Midwest show featuring hundreds of vendors. Corner table placement means easy access for customers from multiple aisles.

shows.name: Spring TCG Swap Meet
shows.description: Great turnout at this spring show! Sold out of most Pokémon sealed and moved a ton of singles.
shows.recap: Fantastic first show of the season! Brought approximately 800 singles across Pokémon, Magic, and Yu-Gi-Oh. Sold out of all sealed Pokémon product by noon. Met a ton of great collectors and made some excellent trades. Already planning to be back at this venue next spring.

shows.name: Naperville Winter Card Show
shows.description: Solid winter show despite cold weather. Good foot traffic and enthusiastic collectors.
shows.recap: Great winter show! Focused primarily on Pokémon singles and sports cards. Bought several collections from walk-in sellers and sold a PSA-graded Charizard on the spot.
